title: STATUS Phoenix 2 Slice Sandwich Toaster | Non-Stick Sandwich Maker | 750W Stainless Steel/Black | PHOENIXST1PKB4
features: Dual Non-Stick Plates: Features dual non-stick plates that ensure easy food release and hassle-free cleaning, making delicious sandwiches with minimal effort.
Compact and Space-Saving: Its compact design is perfect for small kitchens, dorm rooms, or offices, allowing for convenient storage without taking up too much space.
Cool-Touch Handle: Equipped with a cool-touch handle for safe and comfortable operation, preventing burns and allowing for easy handling.
Indicator Lights: Includes handy indicator lights that show when the appliance is powered on and when it's ready to cook.
Overheat Protection: Built-in overheat protection ensures safe operation by automatically shutting off the toaster when it reaches unsafe temperatures.
description: Product Description This Status phoenix stainless steel sandwich maker comes with non-stick plates, creates four rounds of appetising toasted of sandwiches. The heat-resistant 'cool touch' locking handle securely cuts and seals the bread creating ideal sandwiches every time. The power on and ready indicator lights inform you when the plates have reached the correct temperature to start toasting, quick and easy to use. Box Contains 1 x Status Phoenix 750w Non Stick 2 Slice Sandwich Toaster
